personas.name: Literary Reader
personas.profile: Browses new fiction releases and wants confidence that a title is worth buying.

personas.name: Newsletter Prospect
personas.profile: Interested in events and essays but not ready to buy today.
constraints: Needs a visible privacy-safe signup path

tasks.title: Buy an architecture book
tasks.description: Find the featured architecture book and add it to the cart.
successCriteria: A cart or checkout confirmation is visible

tasks.title: Join the newsletter
tasks.description: Subscribe to the publisher newsletter with an email address.
